messages.content: Candidate 3 is committed and pushed at `e9d0332`. Even using the unreconciled one-hour maxima for both completed attempts, this final short pair can raise cumulative exposure only to $5.94, below the $10 ceiling. I’m posting the smoke milestone and dispatching exactly the registered two-job pair from the clean commit.

The final short candidate is live from `e9d0332`: exactly two 5090 pods at $0.99/hour, one per cell, and no third pod. One-hour backstops hold the cumulative worst-case exposure at $5.94. I’m recording the dispatch checkpoint, then monitoring to zero before collection and the final ladder decision.
